channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Catering Staff
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced Catering Crew are sought for an upcoming assignment aboard an Offshore Construction / Pipe-Lay Vessel. Operations will be offshore and international, commencing next week for a duration of 2–2.5 weeks. Positions include First Cook, Second Cook, Steward, and Cook's Mate. Applicants require valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW certification, Marlins Test, relevant offshore vessel experience, a valid medical certificate, and good English command.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancy on Offshore Construction Vessel at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced catering staff are sought for upcoming assignments aboard a Jack-Up/Offshore Support Vessel operating internationally. Open positions include Stewards and Cooks with various contract durations starting in late July 2026. Applicants must possess valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, STCW certifications, a Marlins Test, relevant offshore experience, and a valid medical certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancies on Offshore Support Vessels at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced catering crew are sought for an upcoming assignment aboard an offshore construction and pipe-lay vessel. Positions include First Cook, Second Cook, Steward, and Cook's Mate. Operations will be offshore and international, with a contract duration of 2 to 2.5 weeks. Candidates require valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW certification, Marlins Test, relevant offshore vessel experience, a valid medical certificate, and good English proficiency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancies on Offshore Construction Vessel at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Opportunities are available for freshers and experienced professionals in hotel, resort, and cruise ship roles. Positions offer salaries ranging from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Locations include the Maldives, cruise ships, Gulf region, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel Cruise Staff Vacancies - Maldives, Gulf at Hello Hoteliers

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Cook is required to prepare meals for the crew onboard a vessel.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Messman position is available, responsible for serving food and maintaining messroom cleanliness.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Messman Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location: Italian flag
Description:

Personnel are sought for Steward, Stewardess, Hostess, Bartender, and Waiter positions on Italian flag Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels. Experience is advantageous but not required. The contract duration is approximately 2 months, with potential for extension. Knowledge of the Italian language is considered a plus. All standard Italian flag benefits are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Staff Vacancy on Ro Ro Pax/Cargo Vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Italian flag
Description:

Catering staff are sought for Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels under the Italian flag. The contract duration is approximately 2 months, with flexibility of +/-1 month. Knowledge of the Italian language and prior experience are considered advantageous. All benefits applicable to Italian flag vessels are included. Interested candidates should submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy on Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Italian flag vessels
Description:

Hiring is open for Steward & Stewardess, Hostess, Bartender & Waiter positions on Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels flying the Italian flag. Both experienced and inexperienced candidates are welcome to apply. Further details regarding contract duration and joining dates will be provided upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Staff for Ro Ro Vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Global
Description:

A 2nd Cook position is available on a Fish vessel, operating globally. The role involves preparing daily menu items according to recipes and guidelines, maintaining high standards of food safety and quality, and ensuring galley readiness for inspections. A minimum of 3 years of kitchen operations experience, a Culinary School degree, and fluency in English are required. Food Safety/HACCP certification is also necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Cook Job on Fish Vessel at TSTS Group
